name: Tax-Free Transfer to Controlled Corporation

eligibility.description: One or more persons must transfer property solely for stock and maintain control (80% voting/value) immediately after the exchange.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to transfer property to a corporation in exchange for stock without recognizing gain or loss, provided the transferors control at least 80% of the corporation immediately after.
